mapper.sql: SELECT P.* FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM , PAGING.* FROM (
mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) total FROM PM_PROVISIONING_MST WHERE 1=1 AND USE_YN = 'Y'
AND MAIN_KEY LIKE '%'||#{mainKey}||'%'
AND MAIN_KEY LIKE '{'||'%'||'}'
AND MAIN_KEY NOT LIKE '{'||'%'||'}'

WITH tmplet AS ( SELECT * FROM PM_CONFIG_DTS WHERE MAIN_KEY = #{mainKey} ) , config AS ( SELECT NVL(B.MAIN_KEY, #{mainKey}) MAIN_KEY, A.SUB_KEY, NVL(B.SYNC_SUB_VAL, A.SYNC_SUB_VAL) AS SUB_VAL, NVL(B.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE, A.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE) AS STM_LAST_UPD_DATE, 'EDMP Configuration' AS RSC_SRC FROM ( SELECT a.TMPLET_ID, b.SUB_KEY, c.SYNC_SUB_VAL, a.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE FROM PM_TMPLET_MST A, PM_TMPLET_SUBKEY_MAP B, PM_TMPLET_SUBVAL_MAP C, tmplet d WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.TMPLET_ID = B.TMPLET_ID AND A.TMPLET_ID = C.TMPLET_ID AND A.TMPLET_ID = d.TMPLET_ID AND B.SUB_KEY = C.SUB_KEY(+) AND B.SYNC_SUB_VAL_SEQ = C.SUB_VAL_SEQ(+) AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' ) A, -- 템플릿 ( SELECT A.TMPLET_ID, A.MAIN_KEY, B.SUB_KEY, B.SYNC_SUB_VAL, B.USE_YN, B.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE FROM PM_CONFIG_DTS A, PM_CONFIG_SUBKEY_MAP B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.TMPLET_ID = B.TMPLET_ID AND A.MAIN_KEY = B.MAIN_KEY AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.MAIN_KEY = #{mainKey} ) B -- 설정의 값 WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.TMPLET_ID = B.TMPLET_ID(+) AND A.SUB_KEY = B.SUB_KEY(+) AND (B.USE_YN IS NULL OR B.USE_YN = 'Y') ) , linked_rsc AS ( SELECT B.MAIN_KEY, B.SUB_KEY, B.SUB_VAL, B.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE, A.ITLK_STM_NM AS RSC_SRC FROM PM_ITLK_RSC_MST A, PM_ITLK_RSC_INF B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.ITLK_ID = B.ITLK_ID AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.MAIN_KEY = #{mainKey} ) -- 연동 자원 정보 SELECT * FROM config UNION SELECT * FROM linked_rsc

WITH TOTAL_CNT AS ( SELECT 1 INFO, count(1) AS TOT_CNT FROM PM_STB_RQS_MAINKEY_DTS WHERE MAIN_KEY = #{mainKey} ), CONFIG_SYNC_DATE AS ( SELECT 1 INFO, a.TMPLET_ID, NVL(a.SYNC_LAST_DATE, b.SYNC_LAST_DATE) AS SYNC_LAST_DATE FROM (SELECT SYNC_LAST_DATE, TMPLET_ID FROM PM_CONFIG_DTS WHERE MAIN_KEY = #{mainKey}) a, (SELECT MAX(SYNC_PRG_TO_DATE) SYNC_LAST_DATE FROM PM_TMPLET_SYNC_DTS WHERE TMPLET_ID = (SELECT TMPLET_ID FROM PM_CONFIG_DTS WHERE MAIN_KEY = #{mainKey})) b ), INF_SYNC_DATE AS ( SELECT 1 INFO, MAX(STM_LAST_UPD_DATE) INF_SYNC_DATE FROM PM_ITLK_RSC_INF WHERE MAIN_KEY = #{mainKey} ), ALL_SYNC_DATE AS ( SELECT 1 INFO, a.TMPLET_ID, CASE WHEN a.SYNC_LAST_DATE IS NOT NULL AND b.INF_SYNC_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN b.INF_SYNC_DATE > a.SYNC_LAST_DATE THEN b.INF_SYNC_DATE ELSE a.SYNC_LAST_DATE END WHEN a.SYNC_LAST_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN a.SYNC_LAST_DATE ELSE b.INF_SYNC_DATE END SYNC_LAST_DATE FROM CONFIG_SYNC_DATE a, INF_SYNC_DATE b WHERE a.INFO(+) = b.INFO ), SYNC_CNT AS ( SELECT 1 INFO, count(1) AS sync_cnt FROM PM_STB_RQS_MAINKEY_DTS WHERE MAIN_KEY = #{mainKey} AND STM_LAST_UPD_DATE > (SELECT SYNC_LAST_DATE FROM ALL_SYNC_DATE ) ) SELECT NVL(TO_CHAR(b.SYNC_LAST_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'), '-') AS SYNC_LAST_DATE, NVL(c.SYNC_CNT, 0) AS SYNC_CNT, CASE WHEN b.TMPLET_ID = '1' THEN 1 ELSE NVL(a.TOT_CNT, 0) END TOT_CNT FROM TOTAL_CNT a, ALL_SYNC_DATE b, SYNC_CNT c, INF_SYNC_DATE d WHERE 1=1 AND b.INFO = a.INFO(+) AND b.INFO = c.INFO(+) AND b.INFO = d.INFO(+)
